paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.05, representing a 2.02% increase from the prior close. Over a window of 20 sessions, the price has decreased by 36.32%. There have been 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include "Fermi (FRMI) Is Down 19.0% After Director Exit Over Governance And $375M Convertibles Deal - Has The Bull Case Changed?" from simplywall.st and "Fermi (FRMI) Stock May Be Above Fair Value After Note Offering" from Yahoo Finance. These articles discuss the resignation of a director and the completion of a note offering, as well as the stock's valuation.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031 and the resignation of director Miles Everson. Additionally, there was a Form 4 filing, and 5 new social posts in the last 24 hours, with users discussing the stock's potential future direction.
